shortDescription: Bright 2-bedroom condo in Harbourfront with floor-to-ceiling windows and stunning city views.
fullDescription: Welcome to 5 Mariner Terrace, Unit 2901 in the vibrant Harbourfront neighbourhood. This well-appointed condominium suite delivers effortless urban living with premium amenities. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen is a chef’s dream with quartz countertops, a large island, and high-end stainless-steel appliances. The 2 bedrooms are well-proportioned, with the primary suite featuring a walk-in closet and updated ensuite. Additional highlights include in-suite laundry, ample storage, and energy-efficient mechanicals. Enjoy a 90+ walk score with parks, cafes, schools, and transit all within minutes.
keyFeatures: Cosy living room with gas fireplace
